home.heroSubtitle: Your official profile as a LEAD member. Share your career, skills, and resume. Connect with real opportunities when you're ready.
home.benefitsSubtitle: Build your profile, get your Member ID, and unlock opportunities when you're ready.
home.benefit1Desc: Join your chapter network and be part of the LEAD community across Peru.
home.benefit2Desc: Career, skills, CV, and LinkedIn — all centralized and always up to date.
home.benefit3Desc: Share your profile with LEAD partner companies to unlock internships and career paths.
home.memberIdDesc: — your unique number as an official member of this organization.
home.howSubtitle: Create your profile and get your official LEAD Member ID.
home.howStep1Title: Sign in with Google or email
home.howStep2Desc: Career, skills, LinkedIn, and your CV.
home.howStep3Desc: Your official number as a LEAD member.
home.howStep4Desc: You decide if companies can see you.
home.privacyDesc: Your profile stays private unless you choose to share it with LEAD partners.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create your member profile and connect with the LEAD community today.

homepage.heroTitle: Build your profile. Connect with your chapter.
homepage.heroSubtitle: Your official profile as a LEAD member. Share your career, skills, and resume. Connect with real opportunities when you’re ready.
homepage.valueTitle: A credible bridge between community and opportunity
homepage.valueCard1Desc: Become an official LEAD member with a verifiable Member ID, identity, and participation history.
homepage.valueCard2Desc: Meet students through LEAD chapters, events, and opt-in profile visibility.
homepage.valueCard3Desc: Real companies can only see your profile when you choose to make it visible.
homepage.howSubtitle: Create your profile and get your official LEAD Member ID.
homepage.howStep1Title: Sign in with Google or email
homepage.howStep2Desc: Select your university and graduation year.
homepage.howStep3Desc: Career, skills, LinkedIn, and your CV.
homepage.howStep4Desc: Your official number as a LEAD member. Generated automatically.
homepage.howStep5Desc: Decide when partner companies can see your profile.
homepage.chapterSubtitle: LEAD connects students from universities across Latin America and the United States.
homepage.ctaBody: Create your member profile in minutes and connect with the LEAD community.

professional.title: Professional Profile
professional.subtitle: Update your professional information
professional.visibility: Prepare my profile for authorized opportunities
professional.visibilityDesc: Optional. This preference does not automatically publish your profile or activate company access by itself.
professional.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive emails about events, workshops, and opportunities

profile.updateError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

resume.title: My Resume
resume.currentResumeDesc: Your active resume for job applications
resume.uploadResumeDesc: Upload a PDF file of your resume (max 10MB)
resume.updateResumeDesc: Replace your current resume with a new version
resume.fileTooLarge: File size exceeds 10MB. Please choose a smaller file.

metadata.title: LEAD Talent Platform
metadata.description: Connect with opportunities, chapters, and partners through the LEAD Talent Platform

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Save reusable profile details once, then tell us whether you want to attend events, apply to a chapter, or connect an existing membership.
onboarding.sideSubtitle: This keeps participation simple while making chapter intent clear.
onboarding.sideProfile: Reuse your profile for future event registrations.
onboarding.sideNewsletter: Choose optional LEAD and chapter updates.
onboarding.sideVisibility: Prepare your visibility preference for authorized opportunity workflows.
onboarding.sideMembership: Distinguish public participant, applicant, and reviewed membership states.
onboarding.step1Subtitle: Save the contact details you will reuse for LEAD events.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Tell us what you study, what you are exploring, and the skills you want to share.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Tell us where you are with LEAD chapters. This selection does not approve membership or assign permissions by itself.
onboarding.selectCareerField: Select or type your career field...
onboarding.step4Subtitle: Choose optional updates and a visibility preference LEAD can use only in authorized workflows.
onboarding.step5Subtitle: Confirm your reusable profile so you can register for LEAD events.
onboarding.termsDesc: Required to create your LEAD account.
onboarding.chapterIntentAlreadyMemberTitle: I want to connect an existing membership
onboarding.chapterIntentAlreadyMemberDesc: Select your chapter so the team can validate your state before enabling member permissions.
onboarding.chapterIntentAlreadyMemberStatus: We will save your profile and send this selection for review. Until the chapter approves it, your operational state does not change to approved member.
onboarding.chapterIntentApplyTitle: I want to apply to a chapter
onboarding.chapterIntentApplyDesc: Pick the chapter you want to join. This creates an application pending review.
onboarding.chapterIntentApplyStatus: We will save your profile and create a pending application. Member access starts only after chapter approval.
onboarding.chapterIntentEventsOnlyTitle: I only want to attend events for now
onboarding.chapterIntentEventsOnlyDesc: Keep your profile ready for events without starting chapter review yet.
onboarding.chapterIntentEventsOnlyStatus: We will save only your reusable profile. No chapter application or membership is created.
onboarding.chapterSelectionHelper: We will also preselect this chapter for updates. You can uncheck it in the next step.
onboarding.makeProfileVisible: Make my profile visible to partner companies
onboarding.profileVisibilityDesc: Optional. This prepares your profile for authorized opportunity workflows; it does not publish your information automatically.
onboarding.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive updates about LEAD events, workshops, and opportunities.
onboarding.chapterNewsletterInterestsDesc: Choose chapters you want updates from. This is separate from official chapter review.
onboarding.saveError: We could not save your profile. Review the data and try again.

validation.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with 7 to 15 digits; you may include an international + prefix.
validation.phoneMinLength: Phone number must be at least 5 characters
validation.uploadPdfFile: You must upload a PDF file
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
